Name: Average time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Total time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Agreed across all variants where both activities occur
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time it takes SW-Reviewer Agreed to occur after Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Average waiting time from the previous occurrence of SW-AE Assign Reviewers to Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Total resolution time of Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 measured as the duration until the next distinct activity in the trace
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the end of the case

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer No Response in traces where no agreement follows
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer No Response'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-Reviewer Declined in variants involving repeated reviewer invitations
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Declined'

Name: Elapsed time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the subsequent Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2 when SW-Reviewer Agreed does not occur in between
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 2'

Name: Average time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to be followed by any reviewer outcome (SW-Reviewer Agreed, SW-Reviewer Declined, or SW-Reviewer No Response)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'

Name: Minimum time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Awaiting EIC Decision in end-to-end successful review paths
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Awaiting EIC Decision'

Name: Total time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to SW-EIC Accept in variants that eventually lead to acceptance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Average time between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and SW-Reviewer Selection is now due in delayed reviewer assignment paths
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Selection is now due'

Name: Time from Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to Assign a Different Editor in variants requiring editor reassignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'Assign a Different Editor'

Name: Average duration between Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 and the final decision activity (e.g., SW-EIC Reject, SW-EIC Accept, SW-EIC Major Revision) grouped by variant type
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Total time it takes Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 to result in SW-Reviewer Agreed compared to the time from SW-AE Assign Reviewers to SW-Reviewer Agreed without reminders
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1' and activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed'
